name: SCN-008 | Ransomware Pre-Deployment Simulation
description: Simulates the four-phase pre-deployment sequence used by ransomware operators before encrypting files: disable backup services (VSS, WBEngine), narrate shadow copy deletion, stage a realistic ransom note and encrypted file markers, then summarize all detections for the Taegis handoff. No actual files are encrypted. Designed as the highest-impact demo scenario — shows prospects exactly how Sophos MDR interrupts a ransomware attack before data loss occurs.
